heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 5116i Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter $80,000,000 for fiscal year 2010 and such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2011 through 2015.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 208 and is classified to .section 209 of Pub. L. 93–247section 5116h of this title

Amendments2010—, substituted “2010” for “2004” and “2011 through 2015” for “2005 through 2008”.Pub. L. 111–320, § 1402003— amended section catchline and text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter, $66,000,000 for fiscal year 1997 and such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1998 through 2001.”Pub. L. 108–36
